location: Inside a chest in an underground cellar beneath Dragon-Burnt Ruins — mount Torrent and double-jump over a crumbled wall on the south side of the ruins to drop into a walled enclosure leading down to the basement.
region: Limgrave (Dragon-Burnt Ruins, shore of Agheel Lake)
tactics: Ride Torrent to Dragon-Burnt Ruins and find the ruined building on its south side that can't be entered on foot
Double-jump on Torrent over the crumbled wall into the enclosure to expose the basement entrance
Make sure it's the basement room without rats — a nearby rat-filled room instead holds a teleporter-trap chest
No boss guards the cellar itself; open the chest for the Twinblade
lore: A double-edged blade balanced on both ends of its hilt, built for wielders skilled enough to keep it spinning without cutting themselves — a plain battlefield relic of Limgrave rather than tied to any named character.

builds.name: Dex-leaning quality
builds.why: Dexterity scaling (C) is noticeably better than Strength (D) at max standard upgrade

builds.name: Early Bleed carrier
builds.why: Low requirements (10 Str / 18 Dex) make it a common early Blood-infusion pick for bleed builds
